domain.name: travel
domain.description: Trip planning and itineraries for city travel.

task.name: toronto_7day_trip
task.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A balanced 7-day itinerary for Toronto covering landmarks, neighborhoods, food, and leisure.

schema.name: itinerary
schema.description: City travel itinerary organized by days, with points of interest, restaurants, accommodation, and transport items.

root_fields.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip
root_fields.summary: A 7-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, culinary stops, and relaxed days to recharge.

fields.mode: Airport to hotel (UP Express or taxi)
fields.notes: Take UP Express from Pearson to Union Station for faster transit.

fields.name: Harbourfront / Queens Quay
fields.description: Gentle waterfront walk to stretch legs and get oriented.

fields.name: Dinner on the Waterfront
fields.description: Casual dinner with lake views to end the arrival day.

fields.name: CN Tower & Ripley's Aquarium
fields.description: Visit the CN Tower observation level then the nearby aquarium.

fields.name: St. Lawrence Market
fields.description: Explore food stalls and local vendors; good lunch spot.

fields.name: Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)
fields.description: Collections of natural history and world cultures.

fields.name: Casa Loma or Allan Gardens
fields.description: Choose a historic castle visit or a relaxing greenhouse garden depending on energy.

fields.notes: Ferries leave from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.

fields.name: Centre Island / Hanlan's Point
fields.description: Relax, swim, or picnic; great skyline views from the islands.

fields.name: Kensington Market
fields.description: Eclectic market area with vintage shops and street art.

fields.name: Queen Street West
fields.description: Trendy boutiques, galleries, and dinner options.

fields.name: Day trip to Niagara or visit AGO (Art Gallery of Ontario)
fields.description: Choose a full-day excursion to Niagara Falls or deeper art exploration in the city.

fields.name: Last-minute shopping or neighborhood stroll
fields.description: Relaxed morning with optional final visits depending on departure time.

fields.notes: Allow time for travel and check-in.

user_facing.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip Plan
user_facing.overview: A seven-day balanced plan mixing landmark highlights, neighborhood exploration, optional day trips, and relaxed pacing so you can see Toronto without rushing.

sections.title: Day 1 — Arrival & Waterfront
sections.summary: Settle in and take a gentle waterfront stroll to recover from travel.
bullets: Transfer from Pearson to downtown (UP Express recommended)
Walk along Harbourfront to stretch your legs
Dinner with lake views to end the day

sections.title: Day 2 — Downtown Icons
sections.summary: See major downtown attractions like CN Tower and St. Lawrence Market.
bullets: Morning at CN Tower and Ripley's Aquarium
Lunch and browsing at St. Lawrence Market
Explore nearby historic streets

sections.title: Day 3 — Museums & Gardens
sections.summary: Visit cultural highlights like the ROM and choose a quieter garden or castle visit.
bullets: Royal Ontario Museum in the morning
Afternoon at Casa Loma or Allan Gardens depending on energy
Light evening near your neighborhood

sections.title: Day 4 — Toronto Islands
sections.summary: Take a ferry to the islands for a relaxed day of beaches and skyline views.
bullets: Morning ferry from Jack Layton Terminal
Rent a bike or picnic on Centre Island
Return for a calm dinner downtown

sections.title: Day 5 — Kensington Market & Queen West
sections.summary: Explore eclectic neighborhoods for shopping, street art, and dining.
bullets: Wander Kensington Market in the morning
Afternoon and evening on Queen Street West
Try local cafes and vintage shops

sections.title: Day 6 — Day Trip or More Museums
sections.summary: Choose between a full-day trip (e.g., Niagara Falls) or deeper museum visits in Toronto.
bullets: Niagara Falls for nature and photos or AGO for art
Plan transport ahead if going outside the city
Reserve time for dinner back in Toronto

sections.title: Day 7 — Flexible Departure
sections.summary: A flexible morning for last-minute shopping or a relaxed stroll before you leave.
bullets: Light morning activity based on your departure time
Confirm airport/train transfer and allow buffer
Grab a final coffee or souvenir

domain.name: travel
domain.description: Trip planning and itineraries for city travel.

task.name: toronto_7day_trip
task.title: 7-Day Toronto Trip Plan
task.description: A balanced 7-day itinerary for Toronto covering landmarks, neighborhoods, food, and leisure.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs3
task_schema.description: City travel itinerary organized by days, with points of interest, restaurants, accommodation, and transport items.
task_schema.hierarchy:
Itinerary (root)
    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)
        |-- POI (leaf)
        |-- Restaurant (leaf)
        |-- Accommodation (leaf)
        `-- Transportation (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Restaurant, Accommodation, Transportation
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs3
description: City travel itinerary organized by days, with points of interest, restaurants,
  accommodation, and transport items.
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ |-- POI (leaf)\n        |-- Restaurant (leaf)\n        |-- Accommodation (leaf)\n\
  \        `-- Transportation (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - date
    - theme
    children:
    - POI
    - Restaurant
    - Accommodation
    - Transportation
    index_attr: index
  POI:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Restaurant:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Accommodation:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - checkin_time
    - notes
    - highlights
    children: []
  Transportation:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - mode
    - time_block
    - notes
    - highlights
    children: []
data_files:
  toronto_7day_trip: memory/travel/toronto_7day_trip.xml
default_data: toronto_7day_trip
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs3.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Restaurant, Accommodation, Transportation

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>7 day toronto travel</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>7-Day Toronto Trip</title>
      <summary>A 7-day plan mixing major attractions, neighborhood exploration, culinary stops, and relaxed days to recharge.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <date>Day 1</date>
        <theme>Arrival & Waterfront</theme>
        <Transportation>
          <mode>Airport to hotel (UP Express or taxi)</mode>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <notes>Take UP Express from Pearson to Union Station for faster transit.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>quick transfer</highlight>
            <highlight>light luggage</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transportation>
        <POI>
          <name>Harbourfront / Queens Quay</name>
          <time_block>Late afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Gentle waterfront walk to stretch legs and get oriented.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>water views</highlight>
            <highlight>public art</highlight>
            <highlight>easier pace</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Restaurant>
          <name>Dinner on the Waterfront</name>
          <time_block>Evening</time_block>
          <description>Casual dinner with lake views to end the arrival day.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>relaxed</highlight>
            <highlight>scenic</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Restaurant>
      </Day>
      <Day index="2">
        <date>Day 2</date>
        <theme>Downtown Icons</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>CN Tower & Ripley's Aquarium</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Visit the CN Tower observation level then the nearby aquarium.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>city views</highlight>
            <highlight>interactive exhibits</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>St. Lawrence Market</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Explore food stalls and local vendors; good lunch spot.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>local food</highlight>
            <highlight>shopping</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
      </Day>
      <Day index="3">
        <date>Day 3</date>
        <theme>Cultural Museums & Gardens</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Royal Ontario Museum (ROM)</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Collections of natural history and world cultures.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>galleries</highlight>
            <highlight>architecture</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Casa Loma or Allan Gardens</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Choose a historic castle visit or a relaxing greenhouse garden depending on energy.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>scenic</highlight>
            <highlight>historic or botanical</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
      </Day>
      <Day index="4">
        <date>Day 4</date>
        <theme>Toronto Islands & Leisure</theme>
        <Transportation>
          <mode>Ferry to Toronto Islands</mode>
          <time_block>Morning to afternoon</time_block>
          <notes>Ferries leave from Jack Layton Ferry Terminal; check schedule.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>island beaches</highlight>
            <highlight>bike rental</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transportation>
        <POI>
          <name>Centre Island / Hanlan's Point</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon</time_block>
          <description>Relax, swim, or picnic; great skyline views from the islands.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>picnic</highlight>
            <highlight>views</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
      </Day>
      <Day index="5">
        <date>Day 5</date>
        <theme>Neighborhoods: Kensington & Queen West</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Kensington Market</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Eclectic market area with vintage shops and street art.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>unique shops</highlight>
            <highlight>street food</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Queen Street West</name>
          <time_block>Afternoon to evening</time_block>
          <description>Trendy boutiques, galleries, and dinner options.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>shopping</highlight>
            <highlight>dining</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
      </Day>
      <Day index="6">
        <date>Day 6</date>
        <theme>Day Trip Option or Museums</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Day trip to Niagara or visit AGO (Art Gallery of Ontario)</name>
          <time_block>All day</time_block>
          <description>Choose a full-day excursion to Niagara Falls or deeper art exploration in the city.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>waterfalls or art</highlight>
            <highlight>photography</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
      </Day>
      <Day index="7">
        <date>Day 7</date>
        <theme>Flexible Departure Day</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Last-minute shopping or neighborhood stroll</name>
          <time_block>Morning</time_block>
          <description>Relaxed morning with optional final visits depending on departure time.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>souvenirs</highlight>
            <highlight>cafes</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Transportation>
          <mode>Transfer to airport / train station</mode>
          <time_block>As scheduled</time_block>
          <notes>Allow time for travel and check-in.</notes>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>plan buffer</highlight>
            <highlight>confirm rides</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transportation>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
  </Itinerary_Version>
</Root>
